title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 488.040 - Compensation of jurors, mileage
text:
488.040.  Compensation of jurors, mileage. — Each grand and petit juror shall receive daily compensation and mileage allowance in the amount provided by law pursuant to section 494.455.
(L. 2000 S.B. 1002 Revision, A.L. 2025 S.B. 218)
